title: Buttery Molten Vietnamese Knafeh Pho
description: A twist on the classic Vietnamese Pho featuring a buttery, molten center surrounded by crispy knafeh noodles and a rich beef broth.

ingredients.name: Knafeh noodles
ingredients.notes: Found at Middle Eastern grocery stores

ingredients.name: Double-fried chicken (KFC-style)
ingredients.notes: Breaded and fried to a crispy golden brown

instructions: In a large pot, bring the beef broth to a boil and cook for 10 minutes.
In a small pan, melt the butter over medium heat and sauté the onion and ginger until softened.
Add the fish sauce, soy sauce, and sugar to the pan and stir to combine.
Cook for 1 minute, or until the flavors have melded together.
Add the cooked double-fried chicken to the pan and stir to combine.
Cook for 2 minutes, or until the chicken is heated through.
Meanwhile, cook the knafeh noodles according to the package instructions.
Drain the noodles and set aside.
To assemble the dish, place a portion of noodles into a bowl, then top with the chicken and broth mixture.
Serve immediately and garnish with chopped cilantro, mint, and a lime wedge.
